texto: Learning can take place in the backyard if there is a human being there who cares about the child. Before learning computers, children should learn to read first. They should sit around the dinner table and hear what their parents have to say and think.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Dixie Carter sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Learning can take place in the backyard if there is a human being there who cares about the child…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, learning, children, útil em momentos de children e parents.
